name: Shrimp and Vodka Linguine
recipeIngredient: 1 large ripe tomato or 3 plum tomatoes, cut into 1-inch pieces
1/2 bunch fresh basil, washed and torn into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a pot of 4-5 quarts of water to boil. In a non-stick frying pan, heat the chicken broth. Sauté onions in the stock until transparent, about 10 minutes. Add garlic and sauté another minute. Add vodka, increase heat, and reduce by half, about 2 minutes. Add tomato and clam juice. Cover and cook gently without boiling, 2 minutes.
2. Cut shrimp into 1-inch pieces and add to the pan. Cook, covered for 3 more minutes. Stir in cream, salt, and pepper to taste. Transfer mixture to a large serving bowl and stir in basil. Bring water back to boil and cook linguine for 2 minutes. Drain and toss with sauce. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
